titleStmt.title: SII 17.461: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 461. (A.R. No. 430 of 1904.) VĒDĀRAṆYAM, TIRUTTURAIPPUNDI TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Vēdāraṇyēśvara temple.
The details of date, viz., Ṛishaba ba 11, Sunday, Uttiraṭṭādi corresponds to 1198 A.D. May 3, Sunday, f.d.t. ·63, f.d.n. ·34.

This inscription records the gift of 1500 kāśu by Sundaran Anapāyadēvaṉ, a merchant of Uyyakkoṇḍāṉ Paṭṭinam for burning a lamp to the deity Tirumaṟaikkāḍu-uḍaiyār of Kuṉṟūr-nāḍu, a district of Umbaḷa-nāḍu. The gift was left in the hands of the śivabrāhmaṉas of the temple, who agreed to maintain the lamp with one uḻakku of ghee by the measure called Vēdavananāyaka-nāḻi.

Below this record, is another incomplete inscription of the same king citing the 20th year.It reads: 1 svasti śrī . tribhuvanaccakkaravattikaḷ maturaiyum pāṇṭiyan muṭittalaiyum koṇṭa[ru] 2 ḷi[ṉa śrī ku]lo[ttu]ṅkacoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 makā nāyaṟṟu pūrva pakkattu-

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvanaccakkaravattikaḷ maturaiyum Īḻamum pāṇṭiyanmuṭittalaiyum
koṇṭaruḷiya śrī kulottuṅkacoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu Irupatāvatu Iṣapa nāyaṟṟu
Apara pakkattu Ekādaśiyum nāyaṟṟukkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Uttirāṭatti nāḷ Umpaḷa
nāṭṭu kunṟur nāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tirumaṟaikkāṭuṭaiyāṟku Arumāntil kucimā
nteru Uyyakkoṇṭān paṭṭinattu viyāpāri cuntarananapāyatevan cantirātitta vaṟ ce
lvatāka Upayamāka vaitta tiruviḷakku Oṉṟukku Innāyanār koyil munnūṟṟu Irupatu vaṭṭattu
kāṇi Uṭaiya śivabrāhmaṇarom kaikkoṇṭa kācu Āyirattannūṟu Ikkācu Āyirattaiñū
ṟum kaikkoṇṭu Innāḷ mutal nāḷ Oṉṟukku vetavananāyaka nāḻiyāl Uḻakkāka van=ta ne
yaḷa[ ntu] Erikka kaṭavomākavum Ippaṭi can=tirātittavar Erikka kaṭavomākavum .It reads: 1 svasti śrī . tribhuvanaccakkaravattikaḷ maturaiyum pāṇṭiyan muṭittalaiyum koṇṭa[ru] 2 ḷi[ṉa śrī ku]lo[ttu]ṅkacoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 makā nāyaṟṟu pūrva pakkattu-
Digital edition of SII 17.461 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
